subject: B: pytest for string_utils.py
description:
Write pytest tests for the three functions from A in v8_multiagent_demo/test_string_utils.py. Cover normal, boundary, and exception (TypeError) cases. Run:
  python -m pytest -v test_string_utils.py
from inside the worktree. Only start after A completes and string_utils.py has been auto-delivered to worktree task-B-demo. When tests pass, call complete_task.
